requirements.evidence: Primary/default token mapping is implemented in ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButtonStyle.swift:167-181 and asserted in ios/LaneShadowTests/Atoms/LSButtonTests.swift:9-18; targeted xcodebuild test reported PASS.

Pressed-state mapping for .primary is implemented in ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButtonStyle.swift:184-197 and asserted in ios/LaneShadowTests/Atoms/LSButtonTests.swift:20-28; targeted xcodebuild test reported PASS.

Disabled tokens now apply theme.opacity.disabled across variants in ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButtonStyle.swift:278-332, and action suppression is guarded in ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButton.swift:68-87; assertions exist in ios/LaneShadowTests/Atoms/LSButtonTests.swift:100-130; targeted xcodebuild test reported PASS.

Outline/icon composition uses LSIcon with internal-only color override in ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButton.swift:101-140 and ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSIcon.swift:42-62; outline token expectations are asserted in ios/LaneShadowTests/Atoms/LSButtonTests.swift:155-215; targeted xcodebuild test reported PASS.

All six atoms.button.{variant} stories are registered in ios/LaneShadow/Sandbox/Stories/LSButtonStories.swift:7-35 and aggregated in ios/LaneShadow/Sandbox/LaneShadowStories.swift:51; story-registration grep was reported PASS.

Minimum width/height are enforced in ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButton.swift:121-127 and ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButtonStyle.swift:134-139; the test in ios/LaneShadowTests/Atoms/LSButtonTests.swift:217-225 asserts >=44x44 and the semantic token bundle sets 44px in tokens/platforms/swift/Sources/LaneShadowTheme/Resources/semantic.tokens.json:1380-1390 and :1491-1496.

The button uses a single Button action path in ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButton.swift:68-87 with no extra gesture composition; single-dispatch behavior is asserted in ios/LaneShadowTests/Atoms/LSButtonTests.swift:227-235; targeted xcodebuild test reported PASS.
ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButton.swift contains no literal Color references on inspection, and the provided grep gate for literal colors was reported PASS.

ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButton.swift routes icons through LSIcon at ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButton.swift:136-139 and contains no Image(systemName:) usage on inspection; the provided SF Symbols grep gate was reported PASS.

findings.evidence: The public size API is present, but metrics/typography/icon sizing currently ignore the size case and the tests explicitly assert identical horizontal padding for .sm/.md/.lg. That means size is not yet a visually meaningful dimension even though the atom signature exposes it.
findings.fix: If the product expects distinct small/medium/large button treatments, map LSButtonSize to distinct token-backed metrics/typography/icon sizes and add one targeted story/test per size. If not, consider collapsing the size API in a follow-up.

summary: Approved. The prior blockers are fixed: disabled opacity is token-driven, hover/focus are explicitly modeled with a dedicated 3pt focus ring, the sandbox now exposes the full state matrix, and LSIcon’s color override is no longer public. I found no remaining merge blockers under the sprint’s relaxed review standard.
